get.summary: Returns a list of invitations for the current account
get.description:
Returns a list of all invitations to the current account.
You must have at least one of these scopes: 'identity:account-users.manage, identity:account-users.read'.

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

post.summary: Invites a user to the current account
post.description:
Invites a person to the current account with the requested roles and properties. When you specify 'IsAccountAdmin', the user will automatically have access to all properties in all roles. The user will only be created or linked to the account, when the person accepts the invitation.
You must have this scope: 'identity:account-users.manage'.

404.description: The Request-URI could not be found.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

get.summary: Returns a list of users for the current account.
get.description:
Returns a list of all users that have access to the current account. Can be paginated or not, if paginated then max page size is 100.
You must have at least one of these scopes: 'identity:account-users.manage, identity:account-users.read'.

parameters.name: propertyIds
parameters.description: List of property ids to filter users by

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: Page number, 1-based. Default value is 1 (if this is not set or not positive). Results in 204 if there are no items on that page.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Page size. If this is not set or not positive, the pageNumber is ignored and all items are returned.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: List of all fields that can be used to sort the results. Possible values are: firstname:asc, firstname:desc, lastname:asc, lastname:desc, email:asc, email:desc. All other values will be silently ignored.

422.description: Validation errors in the request body or query params.

503.description: The server is currently unavailable. Please try later.

get.summary: Returns a user for the current account.
get.description:
Returns a user in the current account for a specific subjectId address.

patch.description:
Modify user in an account. Allowed operations: - Replace firstName and lastName - Replace isAccountAdmin (setting it to true or false) - Replace enabled (setting it to true or false) - Replace properties
You must have this scope: 'identity:account-users.manage'.

email.description: Email address, used as the login

properties.description: Properties that user has access to. If the user is invited as account admin, this will be ignored.

isAccountAdmin.description: If set to `true`, user has full access to all properties. Defaults to false.

roles.description: Roles that user has access to. If the user is invited as account admin, this will be ignored.

role.description:
The role to be assigned to the user. If you specfiy this and 'Roles', the combination of both will be used.
If the user is invited as account admin, this will be ignored.

invitations.description: All invitations to the current account

email.description: Email address, used as the login

properties.description: Properties that user has access to

isAccountAdmin.description: If set to `true`, user has full access to all properties.

role.description: Role this user is invited to. If more than one, returns the first.

roles.description: Roles that user has access to

invitedBy.description: Email of the user making the invitation

id.description: Property Id related to this change

roles.description: A list of all existing roles

email.description: Email address, used as the login

properties.description: Properties that user has access to

enabled.description: If set to `false`, the user is disabled for this account and cannot log in

isAccountAdmin.description: If set to `true`, user has full access to all properties.

isMfaEnabled.description: If set to `true` then user has the MFA enabled.

isPasskeysEnabled.description: If set to `true`, user has Passkeys enabled.

email.description: Email address, used as the login

enabled.description: If set to `false`, the user is disabled for this account and cannot log in

isAccountAdmin.description: If set to `true`, user has full access to all properties.

isMfaEnabled.description: If set to `true` then user has the MFA enabled.

properties.description: List of properties to which user has access.

propertyRoles.description: List of properties to which user has access.

users.description: A collection of users that have access to the current account
